title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: LTSA builds sparse alignment matrix B local neighborhoods. observation, package finds neighborhood, computes local tangent-space basis, forms small local weight matrix, scatters weights global sparse matrix. embedding comes lowest nonconstant eigenvectors matrix. deliberately close spectral manifold methods: neighborhood graph disconnected, weakly connected, low-energy cluster cuts across requested ndim, final eigenspace may ambiguous.

title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: iterative backends ask directly ndim output vectors. request wider candidate block controlled eig_k, remove known constant null direction, run small Rayleigh-Ritz extraction inside candidate span. final embedding uses first ndim nonconstant vectors projected solve. default eig_k intentionally wider ndim + 1. Increasing eig_k can help diagnostics suggest candidate span cover enough clustered low-energy eigenspace, also costs work.

title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: Use output = "result" need inspect solve: useful public fields : status: solver-neutral classification requested solve. messages: short explanations warning invalid classifications. eig_k: number backend candidate vectors requested. values: selected embedding eigenvalues. ritz_values: values available null-vector projection inside candidate span. residuals: scaled residuals selected vectors. rank: post-null rank available candidate span. backend: backend metadata convergence counts available. diagnostics classify requested solve; mathematical certificates entire low-energy eigenspace.

title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: eig_method = "rspectra" default. reports RSpectra convergence metadata, hard backend convergence failures can distinguished post-hoc residual boundary diagnostics. eig_method = "irlba" eig_method = "svdr" use irlba routines produce candidate vectors. expose convergence metadata RSpectra, flotsam relies residual eigenspace diagnostics candidate block returned. eig_method = "eig" "eigen" use dense base::eigen() intended small diagnostic references. RSpectra path uses shifted largest-algebraic solves rather asking ARPACK/Spectra work directly zero. approach motivated practical issues around small clustered eigenvalues discussion Aaron Lun, Kevin Doherty, Yixuan Qiu https://github.com/yixuan/spectra/issues/126.

title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: normalize = TRUE solves normalized LTSA formulation. can useful comparison, different spectral objective default unnormalized alignment matrix. downstream task depends geometry clustering embedding, compare diagnostics behavior relying normalized result.

title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: Nearest-neighbor search controlled n_threads. Sparse alignment-matrix assembly controlled separately n_assembly_threads. n_assembly_threads > 1, avoid oversubscribing machine already-multithreaded BLAS/LAPACK setup. practice often means using outer LTSA assembly threads keeping BLAS threads low, keeping LTSA assembly serial BLAS free use threads. copy_max_mib caps optional row-major copy X used high-dimensional local Gram route. Set 0 disable copy peak memory matters local-weight speed.

what: Why spectral methods can still be finicky
title: Numerical diagnostics and solver notes
text: spectral manifold-learning failures implementation bugs. long, thin, uneven, disconnected, weakly connected manifolds can make normalization eigenspace selection problem ill-conditioned. one reason flotsam keeps compact diagnostics visible instead returning embedding hoping best. background spectral caveats, see Goldberg, Zakai, Kushnir, Ritov (2008), Manifold learning: price normalization, references listed README.

title: Authors and Citation
text: James Melville. Author, maintainer, copyright holder.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Melville J (2026). flotsam: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method. R package version 0.0.0.9002, https://jlmelville.github.io/flotsam/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {flotsam: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method},   author = {James Melville},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.0.9002},   url = {https://jlmelville.github.io/flotsam/}, }

what: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
title: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
text: Fast LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method implementation Local Tangent Space Alignment method (Zhang & Zha, 2004), spectral method dimensionality reduction. one methods can unroll “swiss roll” data set variants without major distortion. consider implementation “Fast” use approximate nearest neighbors. Internally works sparse matrices require calculating eigenvectors, can scale large datasets.

title: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
code: library(flotsam)  # Create a "swiss roll": 2D rectangle rolled up in 3D n <- 1000 max_z <- 10  # phi represents the position along the roll phi <- stats::runif(n, min = 1.5 * pi, max = 4.5 * pi) x <- phi * cos(phi) y <- phi * sin(phi) z <- stats::runif(n, max = max_z) swiss_roll <- data.frame(x, y, z)  # See side section to prove it's rolled plot(swiss_roll$x, swiss_roll$y, col = phi)  # unroll it swiss_unrolled <- ltsa(swiss_roll, verbose = TRUE) plot(swiss_unrolled, col = phi)

title: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
text: June 27 2026: Version 0.0.0.9002 big re-write compared initial release, adding multi-threaded C++ local-weight construction, triangular sparse matrix assembly, Rayleigh-Ritz postprocessing reliable final eigenanalysis.

title: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
text: Rdimtools also contains R implementation LTSA. Eigenanalysis carried either RSpectra irlba. Approximate nearest neighbor analysis via rnndescent.

title: Finicky LOcal Tangent Space Alignment Method
text: fairly arbitrary selection papers contained least one thing found interesting writing package. Zhang, Z., & Zha, H. (2004). Principal manifolds nonlinear dimensionality reduction via tangent space alignment. SIAM journal scientific computing, 26(1), 313-338. https://doi.org/10.1137/S1064827502419154 Xiang, S., Nie, F., Pan, C., & Zhang, C. (2011). Regression reformulations LLE LTSA locally linear transformation. IEEE Transactions Systems, Man, Cybernetics, Part B (Cybernetics), 41(5), 1250-1262. https://doi.org/10.1109/TSMCB.2011.2123886 Sun, W., Halevy, ., Benedetto, J. J., Czaja, W., Li, W., Liu, C., … & Wang, R. (2013). Nonlinear dimensionality reduction via ENH-LTSA method hyperspectral image classification. IEEE Journal Selected Topics Applied Earth Observations Remote Sensing, 7(2), 375-388. https://doi.org/10.1109/JSTARS.2013.2238890 Hong, D., Yokoya, N., & Zhu, X. X. (2017). Learning robust local manifold representation hyperspectral dimensionality reduction. IEEE Journal Selected Topics Applied Earth Observations Remote Sensing, 10(6), 2960-2975. https://doi.org/10.1109/JSTARS.2017.2682189 Zhang, S., Ma, Z., & Tan, H. (2017). Equivalence HLLE LTSA. IEEE transactions cybernetics, 48(2), 742-753. https://doi.org/10.1109/TCYB.2017.2655338

what: flotsam: Local Tangent Space Alignment — flotsam-package
title: flotsam: Local Tangent Space Alignment — flotsam-package
text: flotsam implements Local Tangent Space Alignment (LTSA) nonlinear dimensionality reduction.

title: flotsam: Local Tangent Space Alignment — flotsam-package
text: main entry point ltsa(). accepts numeric matrices data frames observations rows.

title: flotsam: Local Tangent Space Alignment — flotsam-package
text: Maintainer: James Melville jlmelville@gmail.com [copyright holder] Authors: James Melville jlmelville@gmail.com [copyright holder]

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: Apply Local Tangent Space Alignment (LTSA) method (Zhang Zha, 2004) dimensionality reduction.

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
code: ltsa(   X,   n_neighbors = NULL,   ndim = 2,   nn_method = "nnd",   eig_method = "rspectra",   eig_k = NULL,   output = c("embedding", "result", "B"),   include_B = FALSE,   include_self = TRUE,   normalize = FALSE,   n_threads = 0,   n_assembly_threads = 1,   copy_max_mib = 256,   verbose = FALSE,   ... )

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: X input data matrix data frame one observation per row. data frame supplied, non-numeric columns ignored. least one numeric column required. n_neighbors size local neighborhood (terms number neighboring sample points) used manifold approximation. NULL, default 15 neighbors computed, inferred precomputed graph supplied nn_method. ndim dimension space embed . nn_method Method finding nearest neighbors, precomputed nearest-neighbor graph. Can one : "nnd" Approximate nearest neighbors Nearest Neighbor Descent. "exact" Exact nearest neighbors exhaustively comparing items. Slow large datasets. precomputed nearest-neighbor index matrix. nearest-neighbor result object idx matrix. eig_method carry final eigendecomposition. Possible values : "rspectra" Use RSpectra::eigs_sym(). default can report hard backend convergence failures RSpectra's nconv metadata. "irlba" Use irlba::irlba() post-hoc residual diagnostics. "svdr" Use irlba::svdr() post-hoc residual diagnostics. "eig" "eigen" Use base::eigen() function. feasible small datasets used diagnostic purposes . Dense "eig" better diagnostic reference algebraic eigenvalue ordering matters. eig_k Number candidate vectors requested final eigensolver. NULL, default min(n - 1L, max(12L, ndim + 2L)), n number observations. Must satisfy ndim + 1 <= eig_k < n. Larger values give Rayleigh-Ritz postprocessing wider candidate span. output return: "embedding" Return embedding matrix. default. "result" Return list containing embedding, compact eigenanalysis diagnostics, assembly diagnostics, optionally B. "B" Return assembled unnormalized LTSA matrix skip final eigenanalysis. include_B TRUE output = "result", include assembled unnormalized LTSA matrix B result object. Ignored output modes. include_self item part neighborhood? minor effect results, work Zhang co-workers (2017) suggests effect main difference LTSA Hessian Locally Linear Embedding (HLLE) method, setting FALSE may allow emulating HLLE method. normalize TRUE, calculate final decomposition normalized LTSA formulation rather unnormalized alignment matrix. separate spectral objective may different downstream properties. n_threads Number threads use. Applies nearest neighbor calculation. n_assembly_threads Number threads use constructing LTSA alignment matrix B nearest neighbors computed. default 1 preserves serial assembly path. Values greater 1 opt parallel construction B, can faster may increase peak memory use. copy_max_mib Maximum size, MiB, optional row-major dense copy X used high-dimensional local Gram assembly. Set 0 disable copy. verbose TRUE log information progress console. ... Extra eigensolver controls. "rspectra", common controls tol, maxitr, ncv. "irlba", common controls tol, maxit, reorth. "svdr", common controls tol . resid_tol gap_tol tune diagnostic thresholds used classify requested solve. backend arguments may cause solve fail.

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: ltsa() builds LTSA alignment matrix local neighborhoods returns lowest nonconstant embedding vectors. default output = "embedding" returns embedding matrix. Use output = "result" inspect compact diagnostics convergence eigenspace ambiguity matters. result contains embedding, eigenanalysis diagnostics, assembly diagnostics, , include_B = TRUE, assembled unnormalized matrix B. diagnostic status messages fields summarize requested solve; look suspicious, rerun larger eig_k stricter backend settings. Use output = "B" return assembled unnormalized LTSA matrix skip final eigenanalysis. normalize = TRUE selects separate normalized LTSA formulation. may different downstream behavior default unnormalized objective.

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: nn_method may precomputed 1-based neighbor index matrix object idx matrix. include_self = TRUE, row must include row index n_neighbors columns. include_self = FALSE, first column must contain row index dropped LTSA assembly, matrix must n_neighbors + 1 columns.

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: copy_max_mib limits optional row-major dense copy X used high-dimensional local Gram assembly. Increase copy useful enough memory available; set 0 disable copy.

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
text: Zhang, Z., & Zha, H. (2004). Principal manifolds nonlinear dimensionality reduction via tangent space alignment. SIAM journal scientific computing, 26(1), 313-338. https://doi.org/10.1137/S1064827502419154 Zhang, S., Ma, Z., & Tan, H. (2017). Equivalence HLLE LTSA. IEEE transactions cybernetics, 48(2), 742-753. https://doi.org/10.1109/TCYB.2017.2655338

title: Local Tangent Space Alignment — ltsa
code: # The default return is the embedding matrix. small_iris <- iris[1:75, 1:4] iris_ltsa <- ltsa(   small_iris,   n_neighbors = 12,   nn_method = "exact" )  # Request compact eigenanalysis and assembly diagnostics. iris_result <- ltsa(   small_iris,   n_neighbors = 12,   nn_method = "exact",   eig_k = 8,   output = "result" ) iris_result$eigen$status #> [1] "warning" iris_result$eigen$messages #> [1] "Only part of a near-zero selected Ritz block is present."      #> [2] "Increasing eig_k or using stricter backend settings may help."  # Return the assembled unnormalized LTSA matrix. iris_B <- ltsa(   small_iris,   n_neighbors = 12,   nn_method = "exact",   output = "B" ) dim(iris_B) #> [1] 75 75

title: flotsam 0.0.0.9002
text: New argument: eig_k, controls number eigenvectors return Rayleigh-Ritz processing step final ndim return. Increasing total number eigenvectors return seems work better parameters cases clusters eigenvalues: RSpectra may entirely miss one results even reports full convergence. New argument: output. output = "result" returns compact eigenanalysis assembly diagnostics. output = "B" replaces older ret_B = TRUE argument.

title: flotsam 0.0.0.9001
text: New parameter: n_assembly_threads control number threads construct B matrix. can now pass precomputed nearest-neighbor index (full dense neighbor graph list created rnndescent) directly nn_method, example ltsa(X, nn_method = nn$idx). Leave n_neighbors unset using correct number neighbors inferred graph. LTSA matrix construction improved high-dimensional inputs (ncol(X) larger n_neighbors) using row-major centered Gram triangular matrix taking advantage B matrix symmetry. New parameter: copy_max_mib control size cap optional row-major dense copy. default 256 MiB. Replaced old sparse slot-search LTSA assembly path serial append/finalize C++ builder. Now modestly faster slightly less peak memory usage. robust eigenanalysis convergence. Iterative eigenanalysis now extracts eigenvectors requested uses null-aware Rayleigh-Ritz polishing candidate subspace attempt better final result. verbose = TRUE reports residual, rank, boundary-gap diagnostics. eig_method = "irlba" "svdr" paths now share postprocessing, rely post-hoc diagnostics report RSpectra-style convergence counts. LTSA now warns final eigenanalysis diagnostics indicate ambiguous low-energy eigenspace, extra near-zero nonconstant modes weak boundary gap requested embedding dimensions. can indicate disconnected weakly connected neighborhood graph, -small n_neighbors, ndim cutting low-energy eigenspace. ndim eigenvalues appear contain part near-zero low-energy cluster, refinement step added tighter settings candidates case eigenvectors missed. Better argument validation eigenanalysis error reporting. Updated GitHub Actions.

title: flotsam 0.0.0.9000
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
